blockingIssues.description: `dualvm/src/App.tsx` renders `TabNav` immediately after the header and never mounts a shared `TxHistoryList` above the tabs, so completed transaction history is not globally visible across tabs as required by the feature contract.

`WritePathSection.extractAmount()` reuses locale-formatted display strings such as `1,234.56 USDC-test`; the resulting comma-containing values later reach `parseUnits()`, so Borrow/Repay Max buttons break on 4-digit+ amounts.

Borrow/Repay Max buttons are sourced from `snapshot.observer`, which tracks the observer-panel address rather than the connected wallet, so the autofilled maximum can belong to an unrelated borrower instead of the active signer.

`LendingRouter.depositCollateralFromPAS()` calls `LendingCore.depositCollateral()` from the router itself, so collateral is credited to the router's position instead of the caller's position and cannot serve as the user's one-click replacement for manual deposit.

The frontend only renders the one-click PAS deposit action when `contracts.lendingRouter` exists, but the canonical manifest imported by `src/lib/manifest.ts` does not include that key, so the shipped UI never exposes the feature.

appliedUpdates.description: Added `.factory/library/frontend.md` documenting that the frontend statically imports the canonical manifest and that the optional `contracts.lendingRouter` manifest field gates the one-click PAS deposit UI.
Added `.factory/library/frontend.md` guidance that `formatTokenAmount()` output is display-oriented and must not be round-tripped into editable inputs or `parseUnits()` without normalization.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require explicit interactive-check evidence for the manual Vite verification step, or require workers to mark `followedProcedure: false` when that manual UI verification was skipped.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both `frontend-tabbed-layout` and `frontend-health-viz` reviews found worker handoffs that claimed `followedProcedure: true` while omitting the `frontend-worker` skill's required dev-server/manual UI verification step.

rejectedObservations.observation: The second manual-verification observation from `frontend-health-viz` repeated the same `frontend-worker` skill compliance gap already captured from `frontend-tabbed-layout`.
